# Architecture вЂ” Mission Built MCP (The Spotter + The Warmup)
*Generated by tech-lead-review В· 2026-05-19*

## Data and Token Flow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph Agent["AI Agent (Claude in Cowork)"]
        A1["Calls MCP tool\n(authenticated via SSE)"]
        A2["Receives instruction text\nor assembled HTML"]
        A3["Writes HTML to workspace disk\n(warmup.html / spotter-*.html)"]
        A4["Calls create_artifact or update_artifact"]
    end

    subgraph Worker["Cloudflare Worker вЂ” mcp.missionbuilt.io"]
        direction TB
        OAuth["OAuth Middleware\n(workers-oauth-provider)\nGoogle sign-in В· PKCE"]
        MCP["MissionBuiltMCP\nDurable Object В· 23 tools\nMcpAgent / McpServer"]
        KV["Warmup KV\nwarmup:{email}:current\n~20KB JSON envelope per user\n(Spotter has no KV вЂ” data baked into HTML)"]
    end

    subgraph Bundle["Bundled at deploy time вЂ” Wrangler text imports"]
        B1["WARMUP_SKILL_MD ~90KB\nWARMUP_SHELL_JS ~1500 lines\nWARMUP_FONTS_CSS base64 @font-face"]
        B2["SPOTTER_SKILL_MD ~29KB\nSPOTTER_SHELL_JS ~1800 lines\narea-examples.md ~64KB\n3Г— calibration epics"]
        B3["APPROACH_SKILL_MD\napproach-template.html"]
    end

    subgraph Cowork["Cowork вЂ” User's browser"]
        ART["HTML Artifact\nFully self-contained вЂ” all CSS + JS inlined\nNo external script fetch В· CSP-safe"]
        BRIDGE["window.cowork bridge\ncallMcpTool В· askClaude В· sendPrompt"]
        LS["localStorage\nwarmup-fonts-v2 cache\n~50вЂ“100KB font CSS"]
    end

    subgraph External["External services"]
        GAuth["Google OAuth 2.0"]
        WS["WebSearch / WebFetch\n(agent-side вЂ” Worker never calls these)"]
    end

    User((User)) -->|"pastes epic or\nstarts config"| Agent
    Agent --> A1
    A1 -->|"HTTP/SSE В· Bearer token"| OAuth
    OAuth -->|"verified UserProps\n{email, name}"| MCP
    MCP <-->|"read/write brief"| KV
    Bundle -->|"bundled at wrangler deploy"| MCP

    MCP -->|"instruction text\n(2вЂ“5KB per primer tool)"| A2
    MCP -->|"assembled HTML\n(~200KB for Spotter вЂ” full shell inlined)"| A2
    A2 --> A3
    A3 -->|"spotter-*.html\nwarmup.html"| ART
    A3 --> A4
    A4 -->|"create_artifact\nupdate_artifact"| Cowork

    ART -->|"callMcpTool(warmup_get_data)\non load + every visibilitychange"| BRIDGE
    BRIDGE -->|"authenticated MCP call"| MCP
    MCP -->|"WARMUP_DATA envelope\n{data, savedAt}"| BRIDGE
    BRIDGE -->|"diff savedAt в†’ re-render\nif data is newer"| ART

    ART -->|"callMcpTool(warmup_get_fonts)\nonce per session вЂ” fonts cached"| BRIDGE
    BRIDGE --> MCP
    MCP -->|"base64 @font-face CSS\n50вЂ“100KB"| BRIDGE
    BRIDGE -->|"inject <style id=warmup-fonts>"| ART
    BRIDGE <-->|"cache"| LS

    ART -->|"sendPrompt(prompt)"| User
    User -->|"prompt fires in chat"| Agent
    Agent -->|"source fetching (Warmup only)"| WS
    OAuth <-->|"token exchange"| GAuth
```

## Warmup vs Spotter вЂ” Artifact Architecture

| Aspect | The Warmup | The Spotter |
|---|---|---|
| Data persistence | Cloudflare KV (server-side) | Baked into HTML artifact |
| Artifact refresh | Auto-refresh on every visibilitychange via `warmup_get_data` | Agent rewrites HTML (Path A or Path B) |
| Template delivery | Chunked in 900-line segments (`warmup_get_template chunk:N`) | Single call returns full HTML (~200KB) |
| Path A | Edit `<script id="warmup-tools">` data tool line | Edit `<script id="spotter-data">` block |
| Path B | Agent stitches chunks в†’ full warmup.html | Agent writes spotter_get_template output verbatim |
| Version marker | `<!-- warmup-engine: vX.Y.Z -->` on line 2 | `<!-- spotter-engine: vX.Y.Z -->` on line 2 |
| Design rationale | Brief is live data вЂ” should auto-update | Report is a point-in-time snapshot |

## Token / Cost Flow

| Operation | Approx cost | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Primer tools (`spotter_review`, `warmup_run`, etc.) | 2вЂ“5K tokens | Instruction text returned to agent |
| `spotter_get_skill(section:"areas")` | ~6K tokens | Targeted section вЂ” prefer this |
| `warmup_get_skill(section:"run")` | ~8K tokens | Targeted section вЂ” prefer this |
| `spotter_get_examples(area:N)` | ~2K tokens | Per-area during review вЂ” correct usage |
| `warmup_save_data` / `warmup_get_data` | 0.5 / 5K tokens | KV write cheap; KV read returns full brief |
| `warmup_get_fonts` | ~15вЂ“20K tokens | Base64 CSS вЂ” cached in localStorage after first call |
| `warmup_get_template(chunk:0)` | ~1.5K tokens | Path B / first-run or engine mismatch only |
| **`spotter_get_template`** | **~50K tokens** | ~200KB HTML вЂ” Cowork may persist to disk on large responses |
| **`spotter_get_examples(area:0)`** | **~16K tokens** | All 64KB examples вЂ” avoid mid-review |
| **`warmup_get_skill(section:"full")`** | **~22K tokens** | Full 90KB SKILL.md вЂ” use section params |
| **`spotter_get_calibration_epics`** | **~7K tokens** | All 3 epics concatenated вЂ” calibration only |

**Key optimization:** `spotter_get_examples` defaults to loading all 64KB when `area` is omitted. Always pass an area number during a review. See P1 backlog item.

## Design Notes

**Shell inlining (current):** Both `spotter_get_template` and `warmup_get_template` inline the renderer JS (`spotter-shell.rawjs` / `warmup-shell.rawjs`) directly into the artifact HTML at request time. No external script fetch is required вЂ” artifacts are fully self-contained and satisfy Cowork's CSP. The single-source-of-truth for each skill's renderer is the `.rawjs` file in `src/`.

**Warmup chunking rationale:** `warmup_get_template` splits output into 900-line chunks because the assembled Warmup HTML (~131KB) exceeds reliable single-response context. The agent stitches chunks using a `<!-- __WARMUP_SENTINEL__ -->` marker. Spotter returns its ~200KB HTML in one call; Cowork may auto-persist large responses to disk (agents handle both the inline-HTML and file-path response cases).

**Font loading via MCP:** Cowork's CSP blocks Google Fonts CDN and jsDelivr. Both skills call `warmup_get_fonts` to retrieve base64 `@font-face` CSS. They share `localStorage` cache key `warmup-fonts-v2` вЂ” one MCP call covers both skills in the same browser session. The Spotter font loader includes a guard (`if (document.getElementById('warmup-fonts')) return;`) so it doesn't attempt MCP calls in standalone exported HTML files.

**Export HTML:** Both skills support offline export. The export function captures `document.documentElement.outerHTML`, then replaces the data `<script>` block with a baked JSON snapshot. Two guards prevent HTML parser breakage:
1. `JSON.stringify(data).replace(/<\/script>/gi, '<\\/script>')` вЂ” escapes `</script>` in data content
2. `function() { return '... <' + '/script>'; }` вЂ” replacer function prevents `$&`/`$'`/`` $` `` expansion and splits the closing tag so the source file's HTML parser doesn't close the script block early

**XSS posture (as of v0.7.19):** `esc()` applied to every agent-sourced field before `innerHTML` insertion across all three Spotter render modes (build / transition / review). `jsEsc()` (esc + backslash + quote escaping) used correctly for inline `onclick` string literals. No `safeUrl()` needed in Spotter since all action links use `sendPrompt()` bridge rather than agent-supplied `href`.

**Prompt injection posture:**
- вњ… `spotter_review` (`epic`) вЂ” fenced in code block, `.max(20000)` zod guard
- вњ… `spotter_iterate` (`draft`) вЂ” fenced in code block, `.max(20000)` zod guard
- вњ… `warmup_run` (`config_summary`) вЂ” fenced in code block, sliced to 8000 chars, explanatory comment
- вњ… `warmup_config` (`source`) вЂ” sanitized (strip control chars + non-ASCII), 120-char limit, explanatory comment
- вљ пёЏ `spotter_build` (`feature`) вЂ” embedded inline as `**${feature}**`, no `.max()` constraint (P2 fix)

**Auth:** Full OAuth 2.1 PKCE flow via `@cloudflare/workers-oauth-provider`. State stored in KV with 5-min TTL, deleted on first read. Google access token used only for identity lookup, not stored.

**No rate limiting at Worker level:** `/sse` is OAuth-gated. Public routes (`/health`, `/brand.css`) are unprotected but stateless. Cloudflare-level WAF rules can be added externally.

**Observability:** No structured logging in TypeScript source. Cloudflare Workers tail + Logpush is the primary debug surface.

## Version Constants (`src/constants.ts`)

| Constant | Current | Bump when |
|---|---|---|
| `SERVER_VERSION` | 1.1.2 | Any `index.ts` change that gets deployed |
| `WARMUP_VERSION` | 0.8.2 | `SKILL.md` or warmup tool instructions change |
| `WARMUP_ENGINE_VERSION` | v0.8.2 | `warmup-shell.rawjs` changes (drives Path A/B) |
| `SPOTTER_VERSION` | 0.7.19 | `spotter-shell.rawjs` or Spotter SKILL.md changes |
| `THE_APPROACH_VERSION` | 0.1.4 | Approach template or SKILL.md changes |
| `TOOL_COUNT` | 23 | Tool added or removed |

3. `spotter-shell.rawjs` вЂ” Sanitize `fontToolName` client-side before `callMcpTool` call
4. `spotter-shell.rawjs` вЂ” Update fallback demo data area IDs/names to match official schema
5. `index.ts` вЂ” Add `.max(500)` to `spotter_build` `feature` param; wrap in fenced block (P2)
